recommendations.title: Killing Daddy
recommendations.overview: When Cassie's father finds himself vulnerable and bedridden, she believes she has the perfect revenge for her mother's death.

recommendations.title: How to Plan an Orgy in a Small Town

recommendations.title: The Kitchen
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Thriller, Drama, Adventure, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Izi's close to escaping The Kitchen, one of London's last remaining housing estates. But when young Benji enters his life, he faces some hard decisions.

recommendations.title: Standoff
recommendations.overview: A troubled veteran gets a chance at redemption by protecting a girl from an assassin after she witnesses a murder. Holding a shotgun with a single shell, he engages in physical and psychological warfare in a desperate fight for the girl's life.

recommendations.title: A Single Man
recommendations.overview: Set in Los Angeles in 1962, at the height of the Cuban missile crisis, is the story of a British college professor who dwells on the past and cannot see his future. We follow him through a single day, where a series of events and encounters ultimatel

recommendations.title: You Can Count on Me
recommendations.overview: A single mother's life is thrown into turmoil after her struggling, rarely-seen younger brother returns to town.

recommendations.title: Paulette
recommendations.overview: Paulette lives alone in a housing project in the Paris suburbs. With her meager pension, she can no longer make ends meet.

recommendations.title: Minha Vida em Marte

recommendations.title: The Witness
recommendations.overview: An ordinary man witnesses a cruel murder and becomes entangled in circumstances out of his control.

recommendations.title: Pegasus
recommendations.overview: Zhang Chi, a hubris and dominating six-time racing champion, falls from grace following a crisis. After a five-year suspension from the motorsport, the now single-father to a six-year-old boy throws down the gauntlet once again.
